title: Kras modulators and uses thereof
abstract: Provided herein are compounds, such as compounds of Formula (I), Formula (l-A), Formula (l-AA), or Formula (l-BB), or pharmaceutically acceptable salts of any one thereof, useful for modulating KRAS GD12 and/or other G12 mutants. (I)
claims:
